AutoIntervalResolution.title: AutoIntervalResolution
AutoIntervalResolution.description: Automatic interval resolution that calculates optimal time buckets based on the widget width, time range, and specified constraints.

minimumInterval.description: Minimum interval duration. The calculated interval will not be smaller than this value.

IntervalResolutionAuto.title: IntervalResolution
IntervalResolutionAuto.description: Configuration for time bucket/interval resolution in time-series widgets. Supports automatic calculation based on widget width and time range, or manual interval specification.

useAdvancedLimit.description: Whether the max. data points and min. interval fields are user-editable. When true, users can modify these constraint fields; when false or unset, they are read-only.

IntervalResolutionManual.title: IntervalResolution
IntervalResolutionManual.description: Configuration for time bucket/interval resolution in time-series widgets. Supports automatic calculation based on widget width and time range, or manual interval specification.

useAdvancedLimit.description: Whether the max. data points and min. interval fields are user-editable. When true, users can modify these constraint fields; when false or unset, they are read-only.

groupByQuery.description: In case of multiple queries, whether legend items should be grouped by their respective queries

isVisible.description: Is the legend visible in the widget
